trans-unit.source: Please select a page from the page tree to run the accessibility check.
trans-unit.target: Tēnā kōwhiria he whārangi mai i te rākau whārangi kia oti ai te arotake ura urunga.

trans-unit.source: Run Accessibility Scan
trans-unit.target: Whakahaerehia te Mātai Urunga

trans-unit.source: Scanning engine:
trans-unit.target: Pūkaha mātai:

trans-unit.source: axe-core (recommended)
trans-unit.target: axe-core (e tūtohutia)

trans-unit.source: HTML CodeSniffer
trans-unit.target: HTML CodeSniffer

trans-unit.source: This module provides automated assistance for accessibility checks. It does not replace a full audit by qualified accessibility auditors, which is required to have a page officially certified as accessible.
trans-unit.target: Ka whakarato tēnei kōwae i tētahi āwhina aunoa mō ngā arotake urunga. Ehara i te whakakapi mō tētahi arotake tino whānui e mahia ana e ngā kaiarotake urunga whai mana, arā te mea e hiahiatia ana kia tapaea he whārangi hei mea urunga i runga i te mana whaimana.

trans-unit.source: axe-core (recommended) checks the page against the WCAG accessibility guidelines — the standard that ensures people using screen readers, keyboard navigation, or other assistive technology can use your content. It is the actively maintained, industry-standard tool and produces very few incorrect warnings, so almost everything it reports is worth acting on.
trans-unit.target: Ka arotakehia e axe-core (e tūtohutia) te whārangi kia rite ki ngā aratohu urunga WCAG — te paearu e whakaū ana ka taea e te tangata e whakamahi ana i te kaipānui mata, te whakatere paepātōtara, me ētahi atu hangarau āwhina te whakamahi i tō ihirangi. Ko ia te taputapu e tiakina ana i ngā wā katoa, he paerewa mō te umanga, ā, he iti noa ana whakatūpato hē, nā reira, tata ki te katoa o āna pūrongo he mea whaitake kia mahia he mahi.

trans-unit.source: HTML CodeSniffer checks the page against similar accessibility guidelines, but with an older, less refined method. It can occasionally point out issues axe-core misses, but it also produces many more results that need a closer manual look before you can tell whether something is really a problem. Use it only for a second opinion, not as your main scan.
trans-unit.target: Ka arotakehia e HTML CodeSniffer te whārangi kia rite ki ētahi aratohu urunga ōrite, engari mā tētahi tikanga tawhito ake, kāore i te tino whakapaipai. I ētahi wā ka kitea e ia ngā take kāore i kitea e axe-core, engari he tini ake anō ōna hua e hiahiatia ana kia tirotirohia mārika e te tangata i mua i te mōhiotanga mēnā he raru pono tēnā mea. Whakamahia noa hei whakaaro tuarua, kaua hei mātai matua māu.

trans-unit.source: Loading page and running scan…
trans-unit.target: Kei te uta whārangi, kei te whakahaere mātai…

trans-unit.source: Violations
trans-unit.target: Ngā Takahi

trans-unit.source: Needs review
trans-unit.target: E hiahia ana ki te arotakehia

trans-unit.source: Automated scanning could not determine whether these items pass or fail. Each one needs to be checked manually.
trans-unit.target: Kāore i taea e te mātai aunoa te whakatau mēnā ka paremata, ka hē rānei, ēnei tūmomo. Me tirotirohia e te tangata takitahi ia mea.

trans-unit.source: Passes
trans-unit.target: Ngā Paremata

trans-unit.source: No accessibility issues found.
trans-unit.target: Kāore he take urunga i kitea.

trans-unit.source: Filters
trans-unit.target: Ngā Tātari

trans-unit.source: Severity:
trans-unit.target: Te Kaha:

trans-unit.source: Critical
trans-unit.target: Tino Nui

trans-unit.source: Serious
trans-unit.target: Nui

trans-unit.source: Moderate
trans-unit.target: Waenga

trans-unit.source: Minor
trans-unit.target: Iti

trans-unit.source: View
trans-unit.target: Tirohanga

trans-unit.source: For editors
trans-unit.target: Mō ngā ētita

trans-unit.source: For developers
trans-unit.target: Mō ngā kaiwhakawhanake

trans-unit.source: The accessibility scan could not be completed. Please try again.
trans-unit.target: Kāore i taea te whakaoti i te mātai urunga. Tēnā whakamātauria anō.

trans-unit.source: No preview URL available for this page. Ensure the page has a valid site configuration.
trans-unit.target: Kāore he URL arokite e wātea ana mō tēnei whārangi. Whakaūhia kei te whai whakaritenga pae whaimana te whārangi.

trans-unit.source: Add an image description (alt text) in the content element editor.
trans-unit.target: Tāpirihia he whakaahuatanga whakaahua (kuputuhi alt) i te ētita huānga ihirangi.

trans-unit.source: This image is not linked to editable content, or its alt text is set but not rendered. Check the template's image rendering (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Kāore tēnei whakaahua i hono ki te ihirangi taea te whakatika, kua tautuhia rānei tāna kuputuhi alt engari kāore i te whakaahuahia. Tirohia te whakaahuahanga whakaahua o te momo tīkanga (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Add an alt text to the image input element in the content editor.
trans-unit.target: Tāpirihia he kuputuhi alt ki te huānga whakauru whakaahua i te ētita ihirangi.

trans-unit.source: This image input is not linked to editable content, or its alt text is set but not rendered. Check the template's rendering (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Kāore tēnei whakauru whakaahua i hono ki te ihirangi taea te whakatika, kua tautuhia rānei tāna kuputuhi alt engari kāore i te whakaahuahia. Tirohia te whakaahuahanga o te momo tīkanga (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Add alt text to the image map area in the content editor.
trans-unit.target: Tāpirihia he kuputuhi alt ki te wāhi mahere whakaahua i te ētita ihirangi.

trans-unit.source: This image map area is not linked to editable content, or its alt text is set but not rendered. Check the template's rendering (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Kāore tēnei wāhi mahere whakaahua i hono ki te ihirangi taea te whakatika, kua tautuhia rānei tāna kuputuhi alt engari kāore i te whakaahuahia. Tirohia te whakaahuahanga o te momo tīkanga (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Edit the content element and change its Header Layout so heading levels don't skip a step.
trans-unit.target: Whakatikahia te huānga ihirangi, whakarērekētia tāna Whakatakotoranga Pane kia kore ai ngā taumata pane e peke i tētahi taumata.

trans-unit.source: This heading is rendered by the page template rather than a content element. Adjust the heading structure in the Fluid template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Ka whakaahuahia tēnei pane e te momo tīkanga whārangi, ehara i te huānga ihirangi. Whakatikahia te hanganga pane i te momo tīkanga Fluid (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: A heading element is rendered with no text. Check the template's heading rendering; it should not output a heading tag when the source text is empty (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Kua whakaahuahia tētahi huānga pane me te kore kuputuhi. Tirohia te whakaahuahanga pane o te momo tīkanga; kaua ia e tuku i tētahi tūtohu pane ina kore he kuputuhi mātāpuna (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Edit the link in the content editor and provide a descriptive link text.
trans-unit.target: Whakatikahia te hononga i te ētita ihirangi, whakaritea he kuputuhi hononga whakaahuatanga.

trans-unit.source: This link is rendered by the page template without link text and isn't linked to editable content. Add visible text or an aria-label in the Fluid template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Ka whakaahuahia tēnei hononga e te momo tīkanga whārangi me te kore kuputuhi hononga, kāore anō hoki i hono ki te ihirangi taea te whakatika. Tāpirihia he kuputuhi kitea, he aria-label rānei ki te momo tīkanga Fluid (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Update the table structure in the content editor to associate data cells with headers.
trans-unit.target: Whakahoutia te hanganga ripanga i te ētita ihirangi kia hono ai ngā pūkoro raraunga ki ō rātou pane.

trans-unit.source: This table is not linked to editable content. Update the table structure in the template so data cells reference their headers (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Kāore tēnei ripanga i hono ki te ihirangi taea te whakatika. Whakahoutia te hanganga ripanga i te momo tīkanga kia tohu ai ngā pūkoro raraunga ki ō rātou pane (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Update the table in the content editor so header cells have associated data cells.
trans-unit.target: Whakahoutia te ripanga i te ētita ihirangi kia whai pūkoro raraunga honoa ai ngā pūkoro pane.

trans-unit.source: This table is not linked to editable content. Update the table structure in the template so header cells have associated data cells (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Kāore tēnei ripanga i hono ki te ihirangi taea te whakatika. Whakahoutia te hanganga ripanga i te momo tīkanga kia whai pūkoro raraunga honoa ai ngā pūkoro pane (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Add a main landmark element to the page template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Tāpirihia he huānga tohu matua ki te momo tīkanga whārangi (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Ensure all page content is contained within appropriate landmark regions in the template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Whakaūhia kei roto katoa te ihirangi whārangi i ngā rohe tohu tika i te momo tīkanga (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Add a skip navigation link to the page template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Tāpirihia he hononga peke whakatere ki te momo tīkanga whārangi (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Set the lang attribute on the HTML element in the page template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Tautuhia te āhuatanga lang ki te huānga HTML i te momo tīkanga whārangi (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Use a valid BCP 47 language tag on the HTML element (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Whakamahia he tūtohu reo BCP 47 whaimana ki te huānga HTML (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Adjust CSS color values to meet WCAG contrast requirements (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Whakatikahia ngā uara tae CSS kia tutuki ai ngā herenga kētahitanga WCAG (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Remove user-scalable=no from the viewport meta tag in the template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Tangohia te user-scalable=no mai i te tūtohu meta viewport i te momo tīkanga (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Add a title attribute to all iframe elements in the template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Tāpirihia he āhuatanga taitara ki ngā huānga iframe katoa i te momo tīkanga (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Make scrollable regions keyboard-accessible in the template (developer task).
trans-unit.target: Kia taea ai e te papapātuhi te uru ki ngā rohe pānuku i te momo tīkanga (mahi mā te kaiwhakawhanake).

trans-unit.source: Check Accessibility
trans-unit.target: Arotakehia te Urunga

trans-unit.source: Check accessibility for this page
trans-unit.target: Arotakehia te urunga mō tēnei whārangi
